mutation MyMutation(
    $headline_artist_name: String,
    $venue_id: Int!,
    $description: String,
    $start_date: String,
    $start_time: String,
    $status: String,
    $lineup: [String!],
    $tickets_manager: [String],
    $id: Int!
) {
    update_backstage_gigs_by_pk(
        pk_columns: {
            id: $id
        },
        _set: {
            headline_artist_name: $headline_artist_name,
            venue_id: $venue_id,
            description: $description,
            start_date: $start_date,
            start_time: $start_time,
            status: $status,
            lineup: $lineup,
            tickets_manager: $tickets_manager
        }
    ) {
        headline_artist_name
        venue_id
        description
        start_date
        start_time
        status
        lineup
        tickets_manager
    }
}

mutation MyMutation(
    $headline_artist_id: Int,
    $venue_id: Int!,
    $description: String,
    $start_date: String,
    $start_time: String,
    $status: String,
    $lineup: [Int!],
    $tickets_manager: [String],
    $id: Int!
) {
    update_backstage_gigs_by_pk(
        pk_columns: {
            id: $id
        },
        _set: {
            headline_artist_id: $headline_artist_id,
            venue_id: $venue_id,
            description: $description,
            start_date: $start_date,
            start_time: $start_time,
            status: $status,
            lineup: $lineup,
            tickets_manager: $tickets_manager
        }
    ) {
        headline_artist_id
        venue_id
        description
        start_date
        start_time
        status
        lineup
        tickets_manager
    }
}

Welcome to the Coronavirus dashboard within Kendraio App, our prototype for experimenting with new ways of accessing, owning and interacting with data. Here's how and why we did it.

Do you have a question or feedback? Join our Slack channel or our Facebook group and start a conversation!
Please note that we are using either historical or mocked up data. Obviously the pandemic is over now so current data doesn't show the benefits of this dashboard.

Play tracks from multiple DSPs within one player and pay artists directly via Web Monetization. Kendraio Player enables a user to pay when Web Monetization support is provided within their browser, or when Coil subscribers login via the Coil API using the Connect button provided. Currently, this Flow integrates DSP1 via a GraphQL API. For more details read our blog post, watch the video explainer and see our website. See the source code. Read about Web Monetization, Interledger, and Coil. Many thanks to Grant for the Web for funding us.

Please note that non-identifying play statistics are collected, the results are aggregated here.

blocks.template: This is a demonstration of Web Monetization. If you have Coil payments, when you play the track, Coil will automatically send donations to a Web Monitization account enabled using the Interledger Protocol. It will stop when the track is paused. For a more complex example see the Player, which has a blog post and screencast that goes into more detail.
